wins: Blackwell production is in full gear across multiple configurations
Blackwell addresses the entire AI market from pretraining, post-training to inference
NVIDIA's automotive vertical revenue is expected to grow to approximately $5 billion
NVIDIA's AI infrastructure is being adopted for robotics and physical AI development
risks: China shipments remain well below levels seen on the onset of export controls
Gross margins are expected to be in the low 70s during Blackwell ramp
Supply constraints impacted Q4 Gaming revenue
Tariff impact to broader semiconductor is an unknown
